artStyle: Magazine editorial photography with warm, inviting tones. Professional but approachable. Well-composed lifestyle shots that feel curated but not staged. Clean, modern aesthetic with natural warmth.
lighting: Soft diffused natural light. Window light for indoor scenes. Overcast outdoor lighting for even, flattering illumination. Warm color temperature throughout. Gentle fill light in shadows.
compositionRules: Balanced rule-of-thirds composition with breathing room. Eye-level perspective for connection. Mix of medium shots (context) and close-ups (emotion). Clean backgrounds that don't compete with subjects.
culturalMarkers: Everyday settings and moments appropriate to the topic — morning routines, family gatherings, neighborhood life, market scenes, workplace moments. Authentic attire and settings that feel lived-in, not staged or stylized.
antiArtifactGuidance: Natural skin tones with clean detail. Realistic fabric textures and draping. Well-defined facial features without smoothing. Clear background elements that look like real places. Proper hand and finger proportions.
